title: Mexican Bean Skillet
description: A flavorful and nutritious Mexican-inspired bean skillet dish, perfect for a quick and easy meal. It's packed with protein-rich black beans and borlotti beans, sautéed with onions and served with a sprinkle of cheese.

ingredients.name: shredded cheese, cheddar or Monterey Jack

instructions: Heat the oil in a medium-sized skillet over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the cumin, chili powder, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the black beans and borlotti beans, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the beans are heated through.
Sprinkle the shredded cheese over the top of the beans and cook until melted and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cheese if desired.
